summary_en: Daitoku Kentaku completed tender offer for 12,715,775 shares of THE Global Ltd. (44.92% voting rights). Minimum acceptance threshold (4,165,600 shares) exceeded; tender succeeded. Settlement scheduled 2026-05-28. Daitoku becomes major shareholder with 44.92% voting stake. Existing transaction relationship: target supplies condominium development to acquirer.
title_en: Results of Tender Offer by Daitoku Kentaku Co., Ltd. for Shares of THE Global Ltd. and Notice of Changes to Major Shareholders and Related Parties
translation_en_brief: Daitoku Kentaku Co., Ltd. completed a public tender offer for THE Global Ltd. ordinary shares that ran from 2026-04-07 to 2026-05-22. The tender closed on 2026-05-22 with 12,715,775 shares tendered, exceeding the minimum acceptance threshold of 4,165,600 shares and validating the offer. All tendered shares were acquired. Settlement is scheduled for 2026-05-28. As a result, Daitoku Kentaku will hold 12,715,775 shares (44.92% of voting rights) and becomes a major shareholder and related party of THE Global. An existing business relationship exists: THE Global develops condominiums that are contracted to Daitoku Kentaku for construction.
